editor.componentSearchHint: Hover a component to highlight it. Click to copy it into the current glyph.
editor.interpolationFallback: Preview fell back to {{layer}} because this glyph cannot be interpolated at the current location.
editor.isNoLongerUsedByAny: is no longer used by any behavior.
editor.name: Name
editor.noAlternatesForThisGlyphYet: No alternates for this glyph yet.
editor.noAnchorsForThisGlyphYet: No anchors for this glyph yet.
editor.noCombinationsForThisGlyphYet: No combinations for this glyph yet.
editor.noContextualRulesForThisGlyph: No contextual rules for this glyph yet.
editor.noNodeSelectedHint: No node selected. Click a node on the canvas to fine-tune coordinates and node type here.
editor.cleanupOverlapsHint: After offsetting, if a contour crosses itself it is rebuilt to remove the loop. Overlaps between separate contours are kept as-is. Rebuilding changes that contour's node structure and breaks master interpolation; contours with no self-crossing keep their original nodes.
editor.referenceFontLoadFailed: Could not read this font file.
editor.referenceFontResidualBuildFailed: Could not build CJK suggestion data from this reference font.
editor.referenceFontResidualDescription: This analyzes the loaded CJK reference font in the background and uses only each Han character's width, height, and centroid residual relative to similarly complex characters. It will not make your glyphs match the reference font's outlines.
editor.referenceFontResidualNoFont: No usable reference font is loaded.
editor.referenceFontResidualReady: Built CJK suggestion data from {{count}} reference characters.
editor.referenceFontResidualUse: Use this reference font for CJK auto-suggestions
editor.segmentAlreadyCurve: This segment is already a curve.
editor.selectedHandleNoNodeType: The current selection is a control handle. Handles do not have square or round node types.
editor.splitMemberOutAsAnIndependent: Split member out as an independent pair

fontExport.iUnderstandUnsupportedImportedOpentypeLo: I understand unsupported imported OpenType lookups will be removed from rebuilt layout tables.

description.font: Lint, gray distribution, and structural outlier checks for the full font
description.focused: Lint and proof comparison for {{scope}}. Full-font baselines are used for reference.

mixedProof.description: Mixed proof: inspect size, baseline, and rhythm when different scripts, languages, and numbers appear in the same line.
mixedProof.focusedDescription: Mixed proof: inspect size, baseline, and rhythm when different scripts, languages, and numbers appear in the same line. Scoped glyphs are interleaved with Latin letters and numbers.

grayProof.description: Set a test article as a paragraph to inspect whether the overall gray value is even and find glyphs that appear too dark or too light.
grayProof.focusedDescription: Mix scoped glyphs into a random article and compare whether their gray value differs from surrounding text.

commit.title: Pre-commit quality check
commit.blockingToastDescription: Open quality check and fix blocking lint issues before committing.

fontOverview.addGlyphEmptyWarningDescription: Enter characters, glyph names, recipes, or Unicode ranges.
fontOverview.closeProjectSaveFailedDescription: The project is still open. Try again later.
fontOverview.glyphCardHint: Click to view details. Double-click to enter the glyph editor.
fontOverview.glyphInputHint: Separate glyph names with spaces or line breaks. Recipes add the target glyph on the right side of the equals sign first.
fontOverview.noMatchingGlyphs: No glyphs match the current filters.
fontOverview.searchPlaceholder: Search characters, glyph names, or Unicode

selection.description: Check this group of glyphs or place them in the glyph editor together.
selection.deletedToastDescription: {{count}} glyph(s) were removed from the current project.

fontOverview.showOnlyEmptyGlyphs: Only show empty glyphs to edit
fontOverview.coverageMissingTitle: Missing glyphs (not in the project yet)
fontOverview.coverageEmptyTitle: Empty glyphs (in the project but not drawn)

glyphInspector.emptyCommitMessageHint: Add or edit glyphs and the commit message will be filled in here automatically.
glyphInspector.gitHubLoginRequiredDescription: Sign in to check forks, push commits, and open the GitHub compare page.
glyphInspector.repoForkHint: After signing in, this shows the source repo, current editing repo, and whether a fork is needed.
glyphInspector.syncRemoteChanges: {{count}} file(s) updated on the remote. Apply them before committing.
glyphInspector.syncConflicts: {{count}} glyph(s) modified both locally and on the remote:

home.largeFontImportNotice: Large fonts may take a while to import the first time. Please wait...
home.localImportDescription: Drag and drop to upload (folders/files are detected automatically), or manually choose a folder or font file (.ufo/.ttf/.otf/.woff/.woff2).
home.chooseDesignspaceDescription: This folder contains multiple .designspace files. Each designspace is a build recipe for one variable font or family; choose the entry to import.

projectControl.exportBehaviorIsExplicitBecauseCompiling: Export behavior is explicit because compiling generated FEA may replace existing compiled GSUB, GPOS, or GDEF tables.

exportImpactSource.drop: This source is not rebuilt by the selected policy.
exportImpactSource.preserve: Imported compiled source is preserved with the existing layout tables.
exportImpactSource.raw: Raw feature source remains in generated FEA.
exportImpactSource.rebuild: Classified source is rebuilt from the Kumiko feature model.
exportImpactSource.review: Compiled source needs preservation review before rebuild.

exportImpactUnsupported.drop: Unsupported lookup is intentionally dropped on rebuild.
exportImpactUnsupported.preserve: Unsupported lookup is preserved with compiled layout tables.
exportImpactUnsupported.raw: Unsupported lookup remains raw source material.
exportImpactUnsupported.rebuild: Unsupported lookup cannot be rebuilt by the managed model.
exportImpactUnsupported.review: Choose preserve or explicit drop before binary export.

drop-unsupported-and-rebuild.description: Compile the managed feature model and intentionally omit unsupported imported lookups.
drop-unsupported-and-rebuild.label: Drop unsupported + rebuild

preserve-compiled-layout-tables.description: Keep imported compiled layout tables. Kumiko behavior edits are not compiled into binary export in this mode.
preserve-compiled-layout-tables.label: Preserve

rebuild-managed-layout-tables.description: Compile editable Kumiko OpenType behaviors into managed layout tables.
rebuild-managed-layout-tables.label: Rebuild managed

compiler-runtime-not-configured.message: Binary font export cannot include current Kumiko OpenType feature edits until an offline feature compiler runtime is configured. Export UFO ZIP or preserve compiled tables to continue without compiling generated FEA.
compiler-runtime-not-configured.title: Feature compilation is not configured

drop-unsupported-requires-confirmation.message: Unsupported lookups will be removed when layout tables are rebuilt. This should require explicit user confirmation before compiler integration is enabled.
drop-unsupported-requires-confirmation.title: Unsupported lookups will be dropped

extension-wrapper-rebuild.message: Imported extension lookups were unwrapped into editable rules. Rebuilding layout tables can preserve behavior, but generated FEA does not guarantee the original ExtensionSubst/ExtensionPos wrapper shape.
extension-wrapper-rebuild.title: Extension lookup wrappers may change

feature-variations.message: Imported FeatureVariations table data is preserved as compiled source material but is not reconstructed into editable rules. Rebuilding layout tables may omit it.
feature-variations.title: FeatureVariations require preservation

preserve-ignores-edits.message: Compiled OpenType layout tables will be preserved, so current Kumiko feature edits are not included in the exported font.
preserve-ignores-edits.title: Feature edits will not be exported

rebuild-replaces-tables.message: OpenType layout tables will be rebuilt from Kumiko's feature model. Existing compiled layout data may be replaced.
rebuild-replaces-tables.title: Layout tables may be rebuilt

unsupported-lookups.message: Some imported OpenType lookups are not editable or not representable. Rebuilding layout tables may remove them.
unsupported-lookups.title: Unsupported OpenType lookups exist

validation-errors.message: Validation errors must be fixed before feature compilation or export can run.
validation-errors.title: OpenType feature state has errors

projectControl.featureCodeIsOrganizedByScript: Feature code is organized by script/language entries and the lookups they reference.
projectControl.featureSourceDataFlow: Handwritten .fea and imported compiled layout tables both flow into the same classified feature / lookup model.
projectControl.glyphAndMarkClassesAreShared: Glyph and mark classes are shared feature resources.
projectControl.importedTablesAreTreatedAsPreserved: Imported tables are treated as preserved source material. Kumiko behavior edits are tracked separately and compiled according to the selected export policy.
projectControl.label: Label
projectControl.languagesystemDfltDfltFeatureLigaSub: languagesystem DFLT dflt; feature liga { sub f i by fi; } liga;
projectControl.localSaveFailedRetryTooltip: Local save failed: {{message}}. Click to retry.
projectControl.name: Name
projectControl.noCanonicalOpentypeFeaturesYetScan: No canonical OpenType features yet. Scan suggestions to create rules from glyph names.
projectControl.noUnsupportedImportedLookupsAreRecorded: No unsupported imported lookups are recorded.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionDiagnostics: Review import, classification, validation, and export warnings for the OpenType layout data.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionExportPolicy: Choose whether binary export preserves existing compiled tables or rebuilds layout tables from Kumiko records.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionFeature: Inspect the generated feature block and source references for this feature tag.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionGdef: Inspect GDEF classes, mark glyph sets, ligature carets, and their source records.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionGeneratedFea: Read-only build output used by the feature compiler when layout tables are rebuilt.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionGlyphClasses: Shared glyph classes used by generated FEA and reconstructed lookup rules.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionImportedTables: Compiled GSUB, GPOS, and GDEF sources imported from binary fonts and mapped back to Kumiko records.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionLanguageSystems: Language system declarations that scope feature blocks in generated FEA.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionMarkClasses: Mark classes and anchors used by mark positioning rules.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionRawFea: Source-level feature text imported from UFO or entered manually.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionSuggestions: Auto-generated OpenType rules that can be accepted into the managed feature model.
projectControl.openTypeDescriptionTable: Lookup inventory and source references grouped by OpenType layout table.
projectControl.rawFeatureTextHelp: Stored in openTypeFeatures.rawFeatureText, inserted into Kumiko generated FEA, and compiled when binary export rebuilds OpenType layout tables.
projectControl.rawFeatureTextPlaceholder: feature liga { sub f i by f_i; } liga;
projectControl.scanFeatureSuggestionsChooseExportBehavi: Scan feature suggestions, choose export behavior, and inspect generated build output from the canonical Kumiko feature model.
projectControl.thisLookupCanBeInspectedBut: This lookup can be inspected but not visually edited yet. If you rebuild OpenType features on export, unsupported data may be removed.
projectControl.axisRangeWarning: Outside the axis range ({{defaultValue}}); skipped when exporting a Variable OTF.
projectControl.importMasterHint: Outlines are matched by glyph name, then unicode. Point structure may differ from existing masters, so a Variable OTF export will require compatible outlines.
projectControl.addMasterCopy: Copy a base master with an outline offset
projectControl.createNewGlyphsForExtras: Create new glyphs for imported extras (filled only in this master)
